findings.recommendation: Pre-existing advisory finding (not introduced by this diff). Apply 'rules not stories' principle: 'Agent Development Use Cases' (133 lines) is a tutorial section listing development types with verbose examples; 'Example End-to-End Workflow' (42 lines) is a step-by-step walkthrough that duplicates the Core Workflow diagram. Both could be reduced to a concise reference list. Target reduction: 175 lines (10.9% -> ~5%). Reference: convert.md cleanup (commit 2d21631) reduced 113 lines (-22%) by removing similar verbose sections. This finding is non-blocking for close — introduced_in_diff: false per AC-12.1 Mechanism (ii) tagging contract.

summary.estimated_reduction: 10-12% for commands/dev.md if pre-existing sections removed

diff_scope_assessment.agents_ba_md: 2 line replacements: Chinese character inline list replaced with indirection reference to ticket doc. No new verbose sections. Pre-existing sections (Quality Standards at line 1439: 21 lines / 1.4%) are below the minor detection threshold (50 lines). introduced_in_diff: false.
diff_scope_assessment.agents_dev_md: 2 line replacements: 'Step 7.5' step-number references updated to 'between Step 7 and Step 8'. Surgical precision fix. No new verbose sections. introduced_in_diff: false.
diff_scope_assessment.agents_graphify_md: 3 changes: frontmatter description update, body step-reference update, venv activation prefix added to execution snippet. File is 89 lines total with no verbose sections. introduced_in_diff: false.
diff_scope_assessment.agents_qa_md: New content: Phase 5 steps 6-9 (vacuity invariant, force-include rule, canonical guard, guard enforcement clause) — approximately 22 lines of executable enforcement rules. Also manifest_verification schema example extended with 4 new fields (vacuous_due_to_empty_active_set, vacuous_reason, guard_verdict, guard_reason). All new content is procedural rule text, not Philosophy/Overview/Quality Standards/Safety Features fluff. No verbose section patterns detected in the additions. introduced_in_diff: false.
diff_scope_assessment.commands_dev_md: New content: graphify sentinel-check conditional block (~15 lines) replacing unconditional dispatch prose. Procedural dispatch logic. Pre-existing verbose sections (Agent Development Use Cases + Example End-to-End Workflow = 175 lines, major severity) were not introduced by this diff. introduced_in_diff: false for the pre-existing violations.
diff_scope_assessment.commands_pull_md: 1-line change: venv activation prefix added to graphify-maintain call. Pre-existing Usage section at line 10 is 6 lines (5%) — well below the minor detection threshold. No new verbose sections. introduced_in_diff: false.

codex_consult.feedback_summary: Codex raised 3 findings: (1) commands/dev.md has pre-existing verbose sections Agent Development Use Cases + Example End-to-End Workflow totalling ~175 lines (major severity, introduced_in_diff: false); (2) severity threshold wording should cite both count and percentage criteria; (3) per-file notes overstated 'no patterns detected' when pre-existing pattern headers exist in ba.md and pull.md. All 3 findings addressed.

findings.issue: commands/dev.md has pre-existing verbose sections (Agent Development Use Cases ~133 lines, Example End-to-End Workflow ~42 lines = ~175 lines total) that should be emitted as a finding tagged introduced_in_diff: false per Mechanism (ii) tagging contract.
findings.proposed_fix: Change conclusion from DRAFT FINDINGS: NONE to: No new-in-diff verbosity violations. One pre-existing non-blocking finding remains: commands/dev.md, severity=major, verbose_lines=175, introduced_in_diff=false.
findings.rationale: Verified: Agent Development Use Cases starts at line 1367 (133 lines), Example End-to-End Workflow starts at line 1500 (42 lines). Combined 175 verbose lines in 1611 total = 10.9%. By count threshold: 100 <= 175 < 200 => major. By percentage: 10.9% < 15% => minor. Higher of the two (major by count) governs. Finding added to report with introduced_in_diff: false.

findings.issue: Severity-threshold rationale relied only on raw line counts; the spec says severity is assigned by count OR percentage (whichever triggers first).
findings.proposed_fix: Replace 'Below all severity thresholds (minor threshold is 50 verbose lines...)' with: 'No confirmed new verbose section was introduced; verbose_lines=0 for the diff. Severity must use both verbose line count and verbosity percentage per prompt-inspector thresholds.'
findings.rationale: Wording corrected in recommendation text and diff_scope_assessment to reference both count and percentage thresholds.

findings.issue: Per-file notes overstated 'no patterns detected': agents/ba.md has a pre-existing Quality Standards section at line 1439, and commands/pull.md has a concise Usage section at line 10.
findings.proposed_fix: Reword to: Pre-existing concise/functional pattern headers exist in agents/ba.md and commands/pull.md, but they were not introduced by this diff and do not create a new verbosity violation.
findings.rationale: Verified: ba.md Quality Standards is 21 lines in 1490 total (1.4%) — below the 50-line minor threshold entirely, so no finding emitted. pull.md Usage is 6 lines in 120 total (5%) — also below the minor threshold. Noted in diff_scope_assessment without generating findings.

codex_consult.feedback_incorporated: Added commands/dev.md pre-existing major finding to findings[]. Corrected per-file scope notes to acknowledge pre-existing pattern headers exist but are below threshold or introduced_in_diff: false. Severity thresholds now reference both count and percentage criteria in recommendation text.
